name: Taph [FORSAKEN]
description:
He does NOT want you 😭🙏

based on a sonic voice over clip where sonic says something like “breathe if you want me, recite the entire Bible in Japanese if you don’t want me” and shadow starts reciting the Bible in Japanese (yall probably know what I’m talking about) but you basically say the same thing to Taph and he recites the Bible in sign language

I don’t have ANY ideas vro please give me some ideas bc this is stupid
